title: Rubio visits Rome aiming to repair White House ties with Pope Leo
summary_full: Relations between the United States and the Vatican are at a low point over President Trump’s attacks on Pope Leo, who is a leading critic of the war in Iran.
summary_public: Relations between the United States and the Vatican are at a low point over President Trump’s attacks on Pope Leo, who is a leading critic of the war in Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: critic of the war in Iran
